title: Qiryath #7154
definition:
Kirjath-baal = "city of Baal"

 1) a city on the northern boundary of Judah and on the western and
    southern boundaries of Benjamin
    1a) also 'Kirjath-jearim' and 'Baalah'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kirjath-baal = "city of Baal"

 1) a city on the northern boundary of Judah and on the western and
    southern boundaries of Benjamin
    1a) also 'Kirjath-jearim' and 'Baalah'

    NASB:  city of Baal, another name for Kiriath-jearim (7157)
